title: Chris The Carrot
description: For an Easter gift that's a carrot above the rest, look no further than this vibrant veggie.

images.alt: Chris The Carrot. A gift comprised of an orange drawstring bag designed to look like a smiling carrot with a green leafy top. It is displayed alongside four bath products, including two bath bombs, a bubble bar and a bottle of shower gel.

The image shows the orange "Chris The Carrot" gift drawstring bag with a green leafy top sitting on a tiled bathroom ledge alongside the included products of two bath bombs, a bubble bar and a bottle of shower gel.

A model's tattooed hand retrieves a small, bunny-shaped bath bomb from the top of a large "Chris The Carrot" drawstring bag. The bag features a smiling face, and the scene is set against the edge of a white bathtub and mint-green wall tiles.

The image shows a close-up of a model's hand holding an orange "Baby Rainbow Carrot" bubble bar by its green paper stalks. The bubble bar is held under a stream of running water over a bathtub filled with thick white bubbles and golden water.

An aerial view image of the Lush "Munching Bunny" rabbit-shaped bath bomb, creating a swirl of pale purple foam. The bunny has a small orange carrot detail on its paws. The product dissolves, leaving a thick blanket of velvety lilac foam.

An aerial view image of the Spring Sunrise bath bomb bath art. The product has almost fully dissolved, leaving behind a vibrant blanket of orange, pink, purple and yellow foam with tiny, velvety bubbles laced across the surface.
